name: Phishing Investigation and Remediation Demonstration
description: Synthetic playbook used to demonstrate a combined semi-automated phishing investigation and remediation workflow.
playbook_processing_summary: Combines analyst review, automated account restriction and stakeholder notification.

external_references.description: Reference operating procedure for phishing cases.

mailbox_user.description: Primary user associated with the reported message.

contains_malicious_link.description: Flag indicating a malicious URL in the message.

auth-info--soar-api.name: SOAR API Key
auth-info--soar-api.description: API key used for SOAR and email security service access.

extension-definition--phishing-demo.name: Phishing Case Extension
extension-definition--phishing-demo.description: Synthetic extension describing case urgency and mail source details.

marking-definition--tlp-green-demo.name: TLP:GREEN
marking-definition--tlp-green-demo.description: Shareable within the wider community according to TLP GREEN.

group--soc-tier2.name: SOC Tier 2
group--soc-tier2.description: Analysts responsible for phishing triage and escalation.

organization--security-ops.name: Security Operations
organization--security-ops.description: Operational security organization owning the workflow.

software--mail-gateway.name: Mail Gateway
software--mail-gateway.description: Mail security platform queried for message enrichment.

http-api--soar.name: SOAR Platform API
http-api--soar.description: API endpoint used to isolate identities and create records.

linux--mail-analysis-host.name: Mail Analysis Host
linux--mail-analysis-host.description: Linux sandbox host used to analyze suspicious message artifacts.

http-api--email-archive.name: Email Archive API
http-api--email-archive.description: Archive API providing message metadata and headers.

organization--hr.name: Human Resources
organization--hr.description: Stakeholder group informed for user communication.

start--phishing.name: Start Investigation
start--phishing.description: Begin handling of a reported phishing email.

action--review-alert.name: Review Reported Alert
action--review-alert.description: Analyst reviews the reported message and initial enrichment context.

if--credible.name: Phishing Credible?
if--credible.description: Determine whether the reported email should be treated as a phishing incident.

action--record-benign.name: Record Benign Outcome
action--record-benign.description: Document the alert as benign and retain the enrichment result.

commands.command: Document benign classification in case management system.

parallel--response.name: Immediate Response Activities
parallel--response.description: Perform automated restriction and evidence collection in parallel.

action--disable-account.name: Disable Account via OpenC2
action--disable-account.description: Use the SOAR platform to suspend the impacted mailbox account.

if--disable-successful.name: Account Disable Successful?
if--disable-successful.description: Check whether automated account disabling completed successfully before synchronizing the immediate response branches.

action--collect-artifacts.name: Collect Mailbox Artifacts
action--collect-artifacts.description: Collect headers, attachments and URLs for later review.

parallel--response-join.name: Join Immediate Response Activities
parallel--response-join.description: Synchronize the successful account disable path with artifact collection before documentation.

action--document-response.name: Document Immediate Response
action--document-response.description: Record the first response actions in the case system.

commands.command: Update the case record with immediate response outcomes.

switch--escalation.name: Select Additional Escalation Path
switch--escalation.description: Choose the next path based on confidence and communication needs.

playbook-action--notify-stakeholders.name: Call Stakeholder Notification Playbook
playbook-action--notify-stakeholders.description: Invoke a separate notification playbook for business stakeholders.

action--manual-review.name: Escalate to Manual Review
action--manual-review.description: Escalate the case to deeper analyst review and scope assessment.

commands.command: Assign case to senior analyst and request deeper review.

action--close-contained.name: Close Contained Case
action--close-contained.description: Finalize the phishing case after remediation and communication steps.

commands.command: Mark case as contained and close the workflow.

end--closed.name: Case Closed
end--closed.description: The phishing case has been finalized.

end--exception.name: Workflow Exception End
end--exception.description: Used when automated restriction or enrichment cannot be completed.
